name: kinprove
description: Kinprove's public catalog of DNA-research recipe skills for AI agents.

plugins.name: dna-research-recipes
plugins.description: Expert judgment layers for genetic-genealogy work: named failure modes, delegate-vs-never-trust boundaries, and the reasoning sequences a confident AI answer gets wrong (unknown parentage/WATO, Y-DNA/mtDNA, AI for DNA & records, evidence & proof).
